narrative_beat: A morte personificada — o quarto cavaleiro avança diretamente em direção ao espectador pelo corredor de dados, inevitável e impossível de fugir

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.camera_angle: straight-on frontal, camera at horse chest height
shot.depth_of_field: horse and rider sharp, corridor perspective background soft

subject.primary: pale horse ivory-white in base color but deep dark crimson shadows pooling in muscle hollows, facing camera directly, head lowered slightly, eyes reflecting red
subject.focal_point: the horse's face and the lower torso of the rider whose face is hidden in shadow under a hood
subject.secondary: rider in bone-white and crimson armor with AI circuit patterns etched into the plate, face completely hidden in shadow
props: ivory-white horse with dark crimson shadow pooling
bone-white and crimson plate armor with circuit etchings on rider
rider face completely hidden in deep shadow under helm
floating orange embers drifting from horse's breath and hooves

environment.location: endless data center corridor perspective, vanishing point behind rider
environment.time_of_day: artificial interior light with emergency red-tinted ambiance
environment.atmosphere: death made technological — the fourth horseman walking the data halls

composition.rule: centered frontal — horse and rider centered, corridor walls providing forced perspective, Ken Burns slow push-in toward the horse face
composition.foreground: pale horse face and neck with crimson shadows, rider torso in bone and crimson
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white endless data center corridor — server rack walls to both sides, ceiling cables, vanishing point of corridor behind rider

lighting.key_light: cold emergency red-tinted light from corridor sides casting crimson shadows into horse's muscle hollows
lighting.fill_light: pale cold ambient from data center overhead strips, desaturated
lighting.rim_light: thin golden rim tracing the top of horse's head and rider's shoulder armor edges
lighting.mood: inevitable doom approaching, the uncanny calm of death that cannot be reasoned with

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: cold dread, the approach of something that cannot be stopped or reasoned with

symbolism.primary: the pale horse of Death in Revelation 6:8 now riding through the data infrastructure — death comes through the network
symbolism.secondary: AI circuit patterns on the armor show death wearing the machine's face in this age

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
